parser_claim: DirectionalCausedMotionVP is registered but has no active constructor or fallback and no occurrence in the inspected non-held-out accepted regression trees.
exact_locator: main.js grammar-legitimacy registry and code-reference screen
source_proposition: The label is dormant metadata rather than an exercised parser construction.
implementation_effect: Treat the label as a merge-or-retire candidate; preserve only independently sourced relations elsewhere.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that absence in fixtures proves impossibility or that a registry label describes a real construction.

parser_claim: Cantonese directional verbs have syntactic and semantic extensions that include causative and ordinary directional uses.
source_proposition: Yiu investigates twelve directional verbs and their spatial and non-spatial extensions.
implementation_effect: Recognize a bounded research family rather than discarding all causative directional behavior.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a complete caused-motion template inventory or unrestricted productivity from an abstract.

parser_claim: A directional verb compounds with the preceding verb in causative use but not in ordinary directional use.
source_proposition: Yiu explicitly contrasts causative compounding with non-compounding ordinary directional use.
implementation_effect: Require causative/result relation evidence before treating verb-directional adjacency as one compound.
forbidden_inference: Do not collapse every directional sequence into caused motion or every caused-motion reading into ordinary direction.

parser_claim: Cantonese causative-resultative constructions form a genuine family with construction-level argument structure and multiple subtypes.
exact_locator: official full text, abstract and subtype sections
source_proposition: Lai and Pang argue that cause/effect verbal elements and argument structure belong to the construction as a whole.
implementation_effect: Reuse sourced causative-resultative relations when an exact subtype is established.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the broader resultative family to validate the dormant DirectionalCausedMotionVP node or an arbitrary verb-directional cross-product.

parser_claim: The dormant label should merge into typed directional and caused-result relations rather than survive as a parallel language-level node.
source_proposition: Existing sourced nodes already preserve direction, motion, result, causation, and argument roles more transparently.
implementation_effect: Mark merge-or-retire while retaining the external causative/directional boundary in research doctrine.
forbidden_inference: Do not delete evidence-backed subrelations merely because this label is dormant.

parser_claim: No inspected source or accepted fixture establishes the exact Canto Span DirectionalCausedMotionVP label, slots, or productivity.
source_proposition: The external evidence supports a family and boundary, not this parser ontology.
implementation_effect: Block productive promotion and implementation under this label.
forbidden_inference: Do not turn family-level evidence into exact-template evidence.

parser_claim: The active fallback recognizes a resource/topic followed by optional subject/negation/copula-or-modal and 用 + 嚟/來 + predicate, assigning an intended-use relation while flagging actual-use and affordance ambiguity.
exact_locator: main.js IntendedFunctionRelation fallback and ambiguity metadata
source_proposition: The runtime already combines a narrow lexical cue with a broad multi-slot wrapper.
implementation_effect: Preserve the overt cue and ambiguity provenance while narrowing the relation.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat the runtime relation name as independent linguistic evidence.

parser_claim: The exact form 呢個用嚟切嘢 is attested with a resource-like subject and a following action.
source_proposition: Wong glosses the example as “This is used for cutting.”
implementation_effect: Retain a narrow 用嚟 + action profile with overt resource structure.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every 用 + 嚟 sequence denotes intended function or that omitted arguments may be freely inserted.

parser_claim: Wong classifies 用嚟 under instrumental serial-verb constructions together with 攞/用/搵 and 愛嚟/攞嚟/用嚟 profiles.
source_proposition: The source treats the form as part of an instrumental SVC family, not a unique dedicated intended-function clause.
implementation_effect: Represent the relation as a narrow instrumental/function serial-verb subtype or competing analysis.
forbidden_inference: Do not assert that IntendedFunctionRelation is standard terminology or the only analysis.

parser_claim: The instrument may be omitted or moved to subject position in the 嚟 profiles; surface position must not be converted into a fixed hidden subject/topic template.
source_proposition: Wong explicitly notes omission or movement of the instrument in these serial-verb patterns.
implementation_effect: Preserve overt resource/topic structure and mark omitted arguments as context-sensitive rather than silently inserting them.
forbidden_inference: Do not force every initial NP to be a syntactic subject or every absent instrument to be licensed.

parser_claim: Purpose serial-verb diagnostics are semantically and pragmatically constrained; adjacency and a possible English “to” paraphrase are insufficient.
source_proposition: Matthews documents optional purposive 嚟/去 and serial-verb restrictions, including indeterminate classifications.
implementation_effect: Separate instrumental/function 用嚟 from ordinary lexical 用, motion-purpose, and other 嚟 linkers.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer one relation from token adjacency or English translation.

parser_claim: Future remediation must split intended function, actual use event, modal affordance, and unresolved instrumental serial-verb readings.
exact_locator: runtime ambiguity branches and source comparison
source_proposition: The current code itself records competing semantic profiles, and the source does not collapse them.
implementation_effect: Narrow the relation and expose ambiguity rather than choosing intended function automatically.
forbidden_inference: Do not hide a genuine ambiguity behind one learner-facing label.

parser_claim: The active category template combines movement_verb + action_verb + delimitative_aspect and labels the result MotionDelimitedVP.
source_proposition: The template is a lexical-category cross-product and has no accepted regression occurrence.
implementation_effect: Quarantine the exact template pending decomposition into sourced relations.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer linguistic productivity from category membership or code reach.

parser_claim: Purpose serial-verb constructions allow a first action or deictic motion verb followed by a purpose action.
source_proposition: Wong defines purpose SVCs and gives 我去(書店)買書, with the intervening location optionally omitted after a deictic verb.
implementation_effect: Represent a purpose relation when semantic and structural requirements are satisfied.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer purpose merely from two adjacent verbs or shared subject.

parser_claim: The exact example 買本書(嚟)睇吓 places optional purposive 嚟 before a delimited second predicate 睇吓.
source_proposition: The source analyzes the later action as the purpose of buying the book and glosses 吓 as aspect on the second predicate.
implementation_effect: Attach 吓 to the second VP and keep the purpose linker independently visible.
forbidden_inference: Do not reinterpret the example as movement_verb + action_verb + 吓; its first verb is 買, not a movement verb.

parser_claim: Serial-verb classification is constrained and sometimes indeterminate; surface adjacency alone does not establish one SVC subtype.
source_proposition: Matthews distinguishes serialization from complementation and coordination and records semantic/pragmatic restrictions.
implementation_effect: Require an independently supported purpose relation and a separately licensed delimited VP.
forbidden_inference: Do not license an arbitrary movement×action×吓 cross-product.

parser_claim: MotionDelimitedVP conflates motion/purpose linkage with delimitative aspect on the second predicate.
source_proposition: The source-backed structure contains at least two independently motivated layers.
implementation_effect: Merge into MotionPurposeChain/SerialVerbPurposeChain plus DelimitedVP or equivalent transparent components.
forbidden_inference: Do not preserve a redundant wrapper solely for label continuity.

parser_claim: No inspected source establishes the exact movement_verb + action_verb + 吓 template as a productive Cantonese construction.
source_proposition: Purpose SVC and delimitative components are attested separately, but the runtime cross-product is not.
implementation_effect: Keep the label source-linked only at component level and block productive promotion.
forbidden_inference: Do not combine component attestations into exact-template evidence.

parser_claim: ProductiveVO is a broad implementation umbrella referenced throughout active runtime composition and appears as a child node in numerous accepted regression trees.
exact_locator: main.js references and non-held-out regression-tree count
source_proposition: The label spans many lexical and constructional environments rather than one bounded template.
implementation_effect: Treat fixture reach as migration impact only and decompose the language claim.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat accepted parser output as independent evidence of productivity.

parser_claim: A descriptive VO structure consists of a verb followed by an object.
source_proposition: Wong defines VO as verb followed by object.
implementation_effect: A transparent internal VO grouping may be retained after lexical and constructional licensing.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer that every verb can take every following nominal or that VO is one construction.

parser_claim: Wong’s VO coding includes copular, existential, and ditransitive examples with recoverable omissions, so the category is intentionally broad and descriptive.
source_proposition: The coding scheme includes 係, 有/冇, and ditransitive forms with omitted subject or object in recoverable contexts.
implementation_effect: Split lexical verb-object composition from copular, existential, ditransitive, and null-argument analyses.
forbidden_inference: Do not use the GACS coding bucket as a single Cantonese construction or Canto Span ontology.

parser_claim: Cantonese grammar distinguishes intransitive, transitive, and ditransitive VP schemata with valency-sensitive complements.
exact_locator: printed p. 37 and simple VP inventory
source_proposition: The synopsis gives separate VP schemata and NP-complement profiles.
implementation_effect: Require lexeme/use valency and complement typing before transparent VO composition.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer valency from token order alone or assume one object slot covers all complements.

parser_claim: “Productive use” in GACS is a developmental type-based scoring threshold, not a grammar-generation license.
exact_locator: official PDF pp. 32-34, lines 1020-1056 and later developmental sections
source_proposition: GACS scores multiple unique exemplars to estimate a child’s abstract knowledge and developmental use.
implementation_effect: Remove or rename the language-level ProductiveVO claim; keep productivity as separately measured evidence if ever established.
forbidden_inference: Do not convert a clinical scoring term into unrestricted parser productivity.

parser_claim: ProductiveVO should become transparent composition metadata or be retired after its subtypes are absorbed by typed constructions.
source_proposition: The wrapper adds a productivity assertion without preserving valency, complement type, omission source, or relation provenance.
implementation_effect: Block supported_productive and migrate uses to typed nodes plus optional internal span grouping.
forbidden_inference: Do not lose overt verb/object spans while retiring the unsupported language claim.

parser_claim: TransitiveVP is used as a transparent wrapper for overt verb-object spans, relative-clause object gaps, clause-relation members, and other nested contexts.
exact_locator: main.js constructors and wrapper use sites
source_proposition: The runtime label covers structurally different sources of apparent transitivity.
implementation_effect: Preserve span grouping internally but split overt complement, licensed gap, and context-driven omission analyses.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer a single Cantonese construction from wrapper reuse.

parser_claim: A broad transitive VP schema with a verb and NP complement is independently documented for Cantonese.
source_proposition: The synopsis distinguishes transitive and ditransitive VP schemata.
implementation_effect: Retain a transparent transitive schema only when lexical/use valency is established.
forbidden_inference: Do not assign transitivity to every action_verb or every verb followed by nominal material.

parser_claim: An SV surface can contain an intransitive verb, a transitive verb whose object is dropped, or a verb followed by an adjective phrase.
source_proposition: Wong explicitly includes transitive verbs with dropped objects in the SV category.
implementation_effect: Keep null-object licensing and lexical intransitivity distinct even when the surface has one verb.
forbidden_inference: Do not infer transitivity or intransitivity from overt token count alone.

parser_claim: VO/SVO coding includes copular, existential, and ditransitive profiles and recoverable omissions.
source_proposition: The source’s descriptive categories cross several predicate and argument types.
implementation_effect: Preserve complement type and construction family rather than using one generic object slot.
forbidden_inference: Do not treat NP, proposition, recipient, theme, predicative nominal, and existential pivot as equivalent objects.

parser_claim: Relative-clause object gaps and ordinary overt objects require separate licensing provenance even when both are wrapped as TransitiveVP.
source_proposition: The runtime creates TransitiveVP in both overt and gap-licensed contexts.
implementation_effect: Carry explicit gap/antecedent provenance and do not insert hidden object tokens.
forbidden_inference: Do not use a transparent wrapper to erase the difference between overt complement and syntactic/discourse gap.

parser_claim: TransitiveVP should remain an internal compositional wrapper, not a promoted productive Cantonese construction.
source_proposition: The broad schema is source-linked, but its runtime scope exceeds any one claim and depends on lexical and constructional licensing.
implementation_effect: Mark source-linked with required valency/null-argument/complement split; keep supported_productive at zero.
forbidden_inference: Do not retire useful transparent structure or promote the wrapper itself as language fact.
